test_case: Send a simple text message via Twilio WhatsApp API
expected_result: Message is delivered to user's WhatsApp within 5 seconds

expected_result: Message is received by n8n webhook and parsed correctly

test_case: Receive message with special characters and emojis
expected_result: Message content is preserved without corruption

test_case: Receive message with media attachment (image)
expected_result: System handles media gracefully or informs user text-only is supported

test_case: Send message with markdown formatting
expected_result: WhatsApp renders markdown correctly (bold/italic)

test_case: User asks 'How many reps should I do?'
expected_result: System matches 'reps' keyword and returns FAQ response instantly ($0 cost)

test_case: User asks 'what rep range is best'
expected_result: System matches regex pattern and returns FAQ response

test_case: User asks about 'sets per exercise'
expected_result: System matches 'sets' keyword and returns sets FAQ

test_case: User asks 'how long should I rest between sets'
expected_result: System matches 'rest' and 'between sets' keywords

test_case: User asks about 'protein intake'
expected_result: System matches 'protein' keyword from nutrition category

test_case: User asks 'how much sleep do I need'
expected_result: System matches 'sleep' keyword from recovery category

test_case: User sends /help command
expected_result: System handles command and returns help text

test_case: User sends /stats command
expected_result: System handles command and returns user statistics

test_case: User sends /pr command
expected_result: System handles command and returns personal records

test_case: FAQ match updates usage_count in faq_entries table
expected_result: usage_count increments by 1 after successful match

test_case: User asks 'what number of repetitions should I aim for'
expected_result: System finds semantic match to reps FAQ (similarity >0.75)

test_case: User asks rephrased protein question 'daily protein requirements'
expected_result: System matches to protein FAQ via embedding similarity

test_case: User asks semantically similar but not exact match question
expected_result: System returns FAQ response when similarity >0.75 threshold

test_case: User asks question with similarity <0.75
expected_result: System passes to Tier 3 instead of returning low-confidence match

test_case: Semantic search returns top 5 matches ordered by similarity
expected_result: Results are correctly ordered by cosine similarity score

test_case: Semantic search only returns active FAQ entries
expected_result: Inactive FAQs are not included in semantic search results

test_case: User asks 'what is my BMR' with complete profile
expected_result: System calculates BMR using Mifflin-St Jeor equation correctly

test_case: Male user 80kg 180cm 30yo requests BMR
expected_result: System returns BMR = 10*80 + 6.25*180 - 5*30 + 5 = 1780 calories

test_case: Female user 60kg 165cm 25yo requests BMR
expected_result: System returns BMR = 10*60 + 6.25*165 - 5*25 - 161 = 1396 calories

test_case: User asks 'what is my TDEE' with moderate activity level
expected_result: System calculates TDEE = BMR * 1.55 (moderate multiplier)

test_case: User with sedentary activity level requests TDEE
expected_result: System uses 1.2 multiplier for sedentary level

test_case: User with very_active activity level requests TDEE
expected_result: System uses 1.9 multiplier for very active level

test_case: User asks 'how much protein should I eat' with weight 75kg
expected_result: System returns protein range 120-165g (75 * 1.6 to 75 * 2.2)

test_case: Protein calculation with decimal weight 72.5kg
expected_result: System correctly calculates 116-160g protein range

test_case: User with 'lose' goal requests calorie target
expected_result: System returns TDEE - 500 calories for weight loss

test_case: User with 'gain' goal requests calorie target
expected_result: System returns TDEE + 300 calories for lean bulk

test_case: User with 'maintain' goal requests calorie target
expected_result: System returns TDEE with no adjustment

test_case: FAQ response with {profile.weight} variable is processed
expected_result: Variable is replaced with actual user weight from profile

test_case: FAQ response with {calc:protein_min} variable is processed
expected_result: Variable is replaced with calculated protein minimum

test_case: FAQ with conditional {#if profile.weight} block - profile exists
expected_result: Conditional content is included in response

test_case: FAQ with conditional {#if profile.weight} block - no profile
expected_result: Conditional content is removed from response
